gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

Additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; additionally, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; additionally, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; additionally, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, as a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; additionally, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, as students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; furthermore, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and some students clutch resumes inside branded folders, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: At the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; furthermore, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and students are clutching resumes inside branded folders, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
